title: May 9
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|May}}

'''May 9''' is the 129th day of the year (130th in leap years). There are 236 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1971]] – [[Domenico Neziti]] is born.
*1971 – [[Dave Boat]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 14|''Star Wars'' (1977) 14]] published. The cover date is August.
*[[1979]] – [[Rosario Dawson]] is born.
*1979 – [[Star Wars Weekly 63|''Star Wars Weekly'' 63]] published.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 47|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 47]] published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 55]]'' published.
*[[2007]] – [[Dark Times 3|''Dark Times'' 3]] published.
*2007 – [[Legacy (2006) 11|''Legacy'' (2006) 11]] published.
*2007 – ''[[Star Wars: Legacy Volume 1: Broken]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic: War 5|''Knights of the Old Republic: War'' 5]] published.
*[[2018]] – [[Darth Vader (2017) 16|''Darth Vader'' (2017) 16]] published.
*2018 – [[Thrawn 4|''Thrawn'' 4]] published.
*2018 – [[The Last Jedi Adaptation 1|''The Last Jedi Adaptation'' 1]] published.
*2018 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 10|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 10]] published.
*[[2025]] – "[[Yoda Rescue / Fossil Hunt]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
